arts.ttl: Arsenal set to make HUGE sell-on fee on Nuno Tavares
arts.sum: Last summer, Tavares joined Lazio from Arsenal on loan with an obligation to buy for just €5 million if certain conditions are met. Those conditions have now been met, meaning Tavares will join Lazio permanently at the end of the season.
